scope.productUniverse: Food DOP/IGP/STG denominations, excluding wine and spirits
scope.purpose: Prioritize denomination support in DOPComply by market size and current growth, avoiding low-market niches until core high-value products are covered.

selectionMethod.secondaryCriterion: Positive year-over-year production value growth from 2023 to 2024
selectionMethod.inclusionRule: Selected the positive-growth denominations from the 2024 top-15 Italian food DOP/IGP products by production value.
selectionMethod.ordering: Value-first among products with positive YoY growth.

importantExclusions.reason: Very large 2024 market value, but YoY value declined by 9.5%.
Large 2024 market value, but YoY value declined by 12.8%.
In current repo and still relevant, but YoY value declined by 2.8%; not a near-term growth priority.
Not present in the 2024 top-15 by production value; keep as a later/niche candidate unless a customer lead appears.

sources.title: Rapporto Ismea-Qualivita 2025, Comunicato Stampa n.1 - Dati Generali
sources.usedFor: Top-15 food DOP/IGP production values for 2023 and 2024, and YoY variation.

sources.title: Rapporto Ismea-Qualivita 2025
sources.usedFor: Report context: 2024 food, wine and spirits IG data; 2025 outlook.

denominations.name: Grana Padano DOP
denominations.strategicRationale: Largest Italian food DOP/IGP by production value and strongest high-value cheese growth; already in repo and should remain a top validation/workflow priority.

denominations.name: Parmigiano Reggiano DOP
denominations.strategicRationale: Second-largest food denomination with double-digit growth, but currently excluded from implementation focus by explicit product-owner decision.

denominations.name: Mozzarella di Bufala Campana DOP
denominations.strategicRationale: Large market even with flat YoY growth; worth supporting before small fruit/vegetable denominations because the addressable compliance base is materially larger.

denominations.name: Gorgonzola DOP
denominations.strategicRationale: Large and growing; already has product rules and workflow work started, making it one of the best near-term products to finish deeply.

denominations.name: Prosciutto di San Daniele DOP
denominations.strategicRationale: High-value cured-meat denomination with solid growth; good next category expansion after cheeses and ABM.

denominations.name: Aceto Balsamico di Modena IGP
denominations.strategicRationale: Reference product in the app, sizeable market, positive growth, and complex multi-operator workflow; keep as flagship implementation.

denominations.name: Mortadella Bologna IGP
denominations.strategicRationale: Large meat-based IGP; growth is modest but value is high enough to justify prioritization over niche produce.

denominations.name: Pasta di Gragnano IGP
denominations.strategicRationale: High value plus double-digit growth; good non-cheese expansion with likely distinct workflow and documentation needs.

denominations.name: Bresaola della Valtellina IGP
denominations.strategicRationale: Already in repo and has double-digit growth; better near-term focus than low-value vegetable/fruit denominations.

denominations.name: Speck Alto Adige IGP
denominations.strategicRationale: Smaller than the top meat products but growing quickly; useful if prioritizing cured-meat workflow reuse.

denominations.name: Mela Alto Adige IGP
denominations.strategicRationale: Best large-growth fruit candidate in the top-15; consider before smaller produce such as Pera Mantovana.

denominations.name: Terra di Bari DOP
denominations.strategicRationale: Lowest value in this selection but exceptional YoY growth; a strong bet if the product strategy wants to enter oils.
